headline: President at We Communicate | Marketing strategies to help result-driven companies and brands bring big ideas to life.
summary:
Accomplished and results-driven professional offering over 18 years of experience translating business initiatives and marketing strategies into bottom-line results in sales, revenue and client growth. Possess strong visual sense, excellent writing skills, and the ability to translate marketing ideas and design concepts across all organizations. Proficiency in developing integrated marketing campaigns that incorporate marketing communications, branding, visual and verbal identity creation, market research, online and offline advertising, social media, direct response, public relations, event management and other relevant channels. Well-versed in identifying market trends and client needs to create innovative, effective campaigns and highly-targeted marketing initiatives.

Proven success developing and executing marketing strategies with the unique ability to understand the ongoing market scenario and customers’ trends using exceptional marketing communication skill. A reputation for delivering and sustaining revenues within a highly competitive market by aggressively identifying opportunities, developing focus and providing tactical business solutions. Ability to manage and develop projects to increase innovation in organizational cultures. A confident and concise communicator; able to deliver enthusiastic presentations with clarity and humor to diverse audiences. 

Demonstrated leadership skills with strong commitment to excellence, effectively executing brand strategies, working effectively in teams, build credibility and cultivate lasting relationships. An impressive record of achievement substantiated with a series of progressively responsible positions in managing lean budgets and staff while increasing profitability and leading high growth ventures in new markets. A talent for recognizing and analyzing client issues, rapidly trouble shooting and finding innovative and creative solutions.

experiences.title: President
experiences.description:
♦	Responsible for the company’s general management, and in charge of a team not only with sales tasks but also administrative and marketing functions.
♦	Oversee organization-wide email communication and coordinates multimodal marketing campaigns across media and audiences. Supervise a direct-report and the scheduling and execution of campaigns.
♦	Identify opportunities, research new campaign possibilities, collaborate with marketing team and create campaigns generating increases annual sales year over year.
♦	Leverage strengths in cost-effective marketing management and vendor negotiations to end each year on budget.
♦	Develop new business units in the company and also help sustain the actual business units like television, print and radio advertising. 
♦	Responsible for planning, development and implementation of all of the company's marketing communications strategies. Demonstrate ability to produce effective advertising, marketing and public relations materials.

experiences.title: Indoor Advertising Director
experiences.description:
♦	Responsible for a sales team that followed the sales model and became one of the most profitable business unit in the company. Trained sales representatives in diverse sales, presentation and negotiation skills for business development.
♦	Identified and pursued new business development opportunities and directed needs analyses and account consultations to achieve optimal sales results.
♦	Drove sales initiative, developed and created innovative marketing, sales presentations and proposals.
♦	Analyzed market trends and sales history to forecast future business and discover new market areas to explore.
♦	Created new business units like an airport unit and a retail unit that nowadays are completely self-sufficient that were thought to be long shots for the company, also in charge of the creative team and the preparation of the public tender proposals that concerned alternative types of media. 
♦	Creation of contracts between indoor advertising facilities and Marketmedios Comunicaciones S.A.

experiences.title: Indoor Advertising Executive
experiences.description:
♦	Responsible for the development of innovative alternatives for contacted clients and also designed a sales model that revolutionized the indoor advertising industry in Colombia. 
♦	Expanded sales using the proposed model to a goal targeted by the company.
♦	Built meaningful relationships with clients and prospects through organized sales, effective marketing and quality customer service and increased revenue through the introduction of incentive programs and integrative advertising solutions.
♦	Established relationships and makes sales presentations with new advertising clients.
♦	Developed and executed print and digital marketing campaigns.
♦	Encouraged, supported and promoted key account development and partnerships that will aid in recommending comprehensive marketing strategies.

experiences.title: Indoor Advertising Asistant
experiences.description:
♦	Responsible for the supervision of advertising installations within the premises of shopping centers, coach stations and amusement parks. Developed and negotiated multi-media contractual agreements increasing advertising revenue.
♦	Create invoices and purchase orders.
♦	Resolved all placement discrepancies and generated make-goods to keep contracted buys cost-effective and efficient.
♦	Worked with ad operations to ensure timely delivery of insertion orders and accurate implementation of ad campaigns and reporting. Also maintained relationships and contracts with show services and general service contractors.
♦	Development of unique and fully creative proposals for clients with design ideas and budget optimization.
♦	Research for potential clients and identifying new business opportunities in the indoor advertising media.
♦	Organized and communicate priorities and action items to help team members, and management, understand what needs to be done, by whom and when.

education.description: Honors: - Universidad Externado de Colombia, Scholarship for highest GPA, December 2005. - Universidad Externado de Colombia, Scholarship for highest GPA, June 2006.

accomplishment_courses.name: América Empresarial, World Sales Forum by Jorge C. Orlando
Kellogg School of Management, The Kellogg Marketing Tour
University of Michigan, William Davidson Institute, Advanced Negotiation Course by Robert Kennedy
Yale School of Management, The Psychology of Successful Negotiators Course by Sharon M. Oster and Jeffrey A. Sonnenfeld
